args: import os,sys,runpy; home=os.environ.get('CODEX_HOME') or os.path.join(os.environ.get('USERPROFILE') or os.path.expanduser('~'), '.codex'); root=os.environ.get('CC_ORCHESTRATOR_HOME') or os.path.join(home, 'skills', 'claude-code-orchestrator', 'scripts', 'cc-orchestrator'); sys.path.insert(0, root); runpy.run_path(os.path.join(root, 'server.py'), run_name='__main__')
